en: If your company is required to comply with Switzerland Statutory Labor Insurance, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form.
Switzerland Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment

In Switzerland, it is mandatory for all employers to provide occupational accident insurance (UVG) for employees working 8 or more hours per week. In addition to accident insurance, employers must comply with statutory social insurance schemes, including Loss of Income Insurance (EO/APG).
Is your company required to comply with Occupational Accident Insurance (UVG) and Loss of Income Insurance (EO/APG) and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from complying with Occupational Accident Insurance (UVG) and Loss of Income Insurance (EO/APG).
The company is made up entirely of foreign employee(s) working in Switzerland that are covered by the home country's scheme and are prepared to provide a copy of the A1 certificate(s) upon request.
